overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through rain-soaked neon-lit Night City streets at night. The vehicle navigates wet roads, enters an underground tunnel with bright holographic advertisements and construction barriers, and continues through urban intersections with various turns.

segments.scene_description: Driving through rain-soaked Night City streets at night, with street lamps casting reflections on the wet asphalt. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle approaches an intersection with crosswalk markings, heading toward a tunnel entrance visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the underground tunnel marked by the green NIGHT CITY neon sign, transitioning from open rain to a sheltered concrete corridor. Bright holographic advertisements illuminate the tunnel walls alongside construction barriers, while the vehicle follows another car through the enclosed passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with construction barriers and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel back into the rainy night, the vehicle navigates urban intersections with crosswalks and construction barriers. Street lamps replace the tunnel lighting as the driver makes turns through the wet city streets, with commercial buildings lining the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban road with digital billboards and road barriers

events.description: navigating curved road with changing direction through city blocks

agents.ego_description: continuing drive through neon-lit city streets with various turns and speed adjustments

concrete and metal barriers lining the road edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued driving through multi-lane urban roads, navigating curves past road barriers and large digital billboards. The rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt as the vehicle maintains speed through the neon-lit Night City streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle moves from the rain-slicked open streets of Night City into a sheltered, neon-lit underground tunnel. It begins by gliding through a nocturnal urban landscape where street lamps cast shimmering reflections on wet asphalt and pedestrians line the sidewalks. As the vehicle approaches a marked intersection, the open city air gives way to the mouth of a tunnel, signaled by a glowing green NIGHT CITY neon sign. The scene then shifts from the rainy exterior to a concrete corridor, where the environment is suddenly illuminated by bright holographic advertisements and construction barriers. The camera continues forward through this enclosed passage, following another car deep into the subterranean glow.

The shot follows a continuous drive from the artificial glow of an underground tunnel back into the rain-drenched neon expanse of Night City. It begins as the vehicle emerges from the tunnel, where the enclosed lighting is replaced by the cool flicker of street lamps and the shimmer of wet crosswalks. As the driver navigates through urban intersections and around construction barriers, the scene opens up to reveal towering commercial buildings lining the rain-slicked roads. The camera then glides through a series of curves on multi-lane streets, passing large digital billboards that cast vibrant colors across the asphalt. Finally, the vehicle maintains its speed through the heart of the city, weaving past road barriers under a persistent downpour of rain.
